dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal applies swing-following logic: entry requires second day with higher high AND no lower low (i.e., low >= previous low). Exit uses reversal condition (close below previous close) since AUTHOR_SILENT. Stop loss derived from $5 swing threshold on gold (approximately 0.2-0.3% typical, rounded to 5% for safety margin). Regime set to TRENDING_UP per Category:TREND and Direction:LONG context.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal applies swing-following logic: entry requires second day with higher high AND no lower low (i.e., low >= previous low). Exit uses reversal condition (close below previous close) since AUTHOR_SILENT. Stop loss derived from $5 swing threshold on gold (approximately 0.2-0.3% typical, rounded to 5% for safety margin). Regime set to TRENDING_UP per Category:TREND and Direction:LONG context.

source_rule_text: If the second day shows a higher high but not a lower low, continue the upswing by extending the first swing higher and ignore the low of that day.
